#1 BENSON/BAUEER: C/C FOR SETTL CONF. ATTY J BORNSTEIN APP FOR PLTF. DEFT D MALAKIE PRESENT IN PRO PER. SETTLED. TERMS NOT ON RECORD. DEFT UNDERSTANDS & AGREES TO TERMS. JDMT BY STIP FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALAKIE, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1040 HOWARD #6, STAYED UNTIL JAN-28-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59 PM. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY AMEND JDMT FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES, ATTY FEES & COSTS. PLTF TO KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
